name: Single Origin Clove
specimenCopy: A flower bud, picked before it opened. Too early and the oils aren't ready; too late and they're already leaving. This clove comes from communities across the Western Ghats — Idukki, Kottayam, Pathanamthitta, south to Nagercoil. Single origin means single bioregion, honestly sourced.

sensoryProfile.aroma: Sharp camphor, warm wood, spicy eugenol core
sensoryProfile.flavor: Intense pungent warmth, tongue-numbing spice, sweet background
sensoryProfile.appearance: Plump, reddish-brown dried buds with uniform crowns
